positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical graphic design featuring a cosmic forest landscape. The scene depicts bioluminescent fauna and towering stylized flora (like crystalized ferns and nebula-lit trees) arranged in a central, radial composition. Color palette should be deep indigo, rich teal, vibrant lavender, and electric cyan, contrasted against a matte black background. The aesthetic should be neo-art deco mixed with vaporwave science fantasy, focusing on clean, impactful silhouettes and geometric patterns. Cinematic, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel, maximalist pattern repeat ready.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, text, signature, watermark, logo, low quality, noisy, artifacts, messy composition, photorealism, grainy, jpeg artifacts, out of focus
